description: WS6-c (#610 §6) library-name alias table: maps each legacy per-core `cores.<id>.libraries:` enum token to its canonical `metadata/libraries/<name>.yaml` manifest name. Drives the board.yaml v1->v2 alp-migrate migration (m001_to_v2) and a temporary read-compat in the loader. check_library_registry.py asserts every curated token resolves to exactly one existing manifest. Once the migration + resolution rewrite land and no board.yaml uses the legacy tokens, this table is retired (no compatibility aliases survive per epic #610 §6).
